---
applyTo: "**"
---

# GameConfig Sections (`globals/game_config.gd`)

All game-balance tuning constants live in the `GameConfig` autoload. See `architecture.instructions.md` for the mandatory reference rule and how to access constants. The full constant inventory by section:

| Section                    | Key Constants                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| -------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Player                     | `PLAYER_BASE_SPEED`, `PLAYER_TURN_RATE`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Enemies (Scaling)          | `ENEMY_BASE_SPEED`, `ENEMY_HP_EXPONENT`, `ENEMY_DAMAGE_SCALE_PER_MINUTE`, `ENEMY_XP_NORMAL`, `ENEMY_XP_ELITE_MIN`, `ENEMY_XP_ELITE_MAX`, `ENEMY_CREDITS_NORMAL`, `ENEMY_CREDITS_ELITE_MIN`, `ENEMY_CREDITS_ELITE_MAX`                                                                                                            |
| Enemies (Elites)           | `ELITE_BASE_CHANCE`, `ELITE_HP_MULT`, `ELITE_DAMAGE_MULT`, `ELITE_SIZE_SCALE`, `ELITE_COLOR`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Difficulty Stat            | `DIFFICULTY_HP_WEIGHT`, `DIFFICULTY_DAMAGE_WEIGHT`, `DIFFICULTY_SPAWN_WEIGHT`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Spawning                   | `BASE_SPAWN_RATE`, `SPAWN_RATE_GROWTH`, `SPAWN_RADIUS_MIN`, `SPAWN_RADIUS_MAX`, `SPAWN_BATCH_MIN_MINUTE`, `SPAWN_BATCH_SIZE_PER_MINUTE`, batch/overtime tuning                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Overtime Difficulty        | `OVERTIME_MULTIPLIER_START`, `OVERTIME_MULTIPLIER_INCREMENT`, `OVERTIME_MULTIPLIER_INTERVAL`, `OVERTIME_MULTIPLIER_CAP` — escalating enemy HP/damage/speed multiplier after countdown hits zero                                                                                                                                  |
| Swarm Events               | `SWARM_TIMES`, `SWARM_DURATION_MIN`, `SWARM_DURATION_MAX`, `SWARM_SPAWN_MULTIPLIER`, `SWARM_WARNING_DURATION`                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Pickups                    | `PICKUP_MAGNET_RADIUS`, `PICKUP_MAGNET_SPEED`, `PICKUP_MAGNET_ACCELERATION`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Credits                    | Guaranteed 1 per kill (no constants needed — `credits_gain` stat multiplies via ProgressionManager). Credits instantly attract to player on spawn.                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Stardust                   | `STARDUST_BASE_DROP_CHANCE` — base % chance for normal enemies to drop stardust (3%). Freighters always drop.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Run                        | `DEFAULT_RUN_DURATION`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Level Up / Progression     | `XP_BASE`, `XP_EXPONENT`, `MAX_WEAPON_SLOTS`, `MAX_MODULE_SLOTS`, `LEVEL_UP_OPTION_COUNT`, `LEVEL_UP_REFRESH_COST`                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Phase Shift                | `PHASE_SHIFT_DURATION`, `PHASE_SHIFT_COOLDOWN`, `PHASE_RECHARGE_TIME`, `POST_PHASE_IFRAMES`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Survivability / I-Frames   | `DAMAGE_IFRAMES`, `PLAYER_KNOCKBACK_FORCE`, knockback friction, contact damage interval                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Combat / Stats             | `SHIELD_RECHARGE_DELAY`, `SHIELD_RECHARGE_RATE`, `DIMINISHING_RETURNS_DENOMINATOR`, `STAT_CAPS`, `WEAPON_TARGETING_RANGE`, `PROJECTILE_DEFAULT_LIFETIME`, `ENEMY_GRID_CELL_SIZE`                                                                                                                                                 |
| Camera                     | `CAMERA_BASE_ZOOM`, `CAMERA_SPEED_ZOOM_FACTOR`, `CAMERA_MIN_ZOOM`, `CAMERA_ZOOM_LERP`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Upgrade Offer Weights      | `OFFER_WEIGHT_*` — controls weapon vs module frequency at level-up                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Loot Freighter             | `FREIGHTER_FLEE_DRIFT_INTERVAL`, `FREIGHTER_FLEE_DRIFT_ANGLE`, `FREIGHTER_MAX_ACTIVE`, `FREIGHTER_SPAWN_COOLDOWN_MIN`, `FREIGHTER_SPAWN_COOLDOWN_MAX`                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Pickup Scatter (cosmetic)  | `PICKUP_SCATTER_XP`, `PICKUP_SCATTER_CREDIT`, `PICKUP_SCATTER_BURST`, `PICKUP_SCATTER_STARDUST`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| UI Cosmetic                | `GAME_OVER_DELAY`, `HUD_AVATAR_SIZE`, `HUD_AVATAR_CROP_FRACTION`, `EVADE_POPUP_COOLDOWN`, `LEVEL_UP_QUEUE_FLASH_DELAY`                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Damage Numbers             | `DAMAGE_NUMBER_FONT_SIZE_NORMAL/CRIT/OVERCRIT`, `DAMAGE_NUMBER_DURATION`, `DAMAGE_NUMBER_RISE_DISTANCE`, `DAMAGE_NUMBER_OFFSET_RANGE`, `DAMAGE_NUMBER_MAX_COUNT`, `DAMAGE_NUMBER_CRIT_SCALE`, `DAMAGE_NUMBER_OVERCRIT_SCALE`, `DAMAGE_NUMBER_OUTLINE_SIZE`                                                                       |
| XP Popup                   | `XP_POPUP_FONT_SIZE`, `XP_POPUP_RADIUS`, `XP_POPUP_ANGLE_DEG`, `XP_POPUP_OUTLINE_SIZE`, `XP_POPUP_COLOR`, `XP_POPUP_IDLE_TIMEOUT`, `XP_POPUP_FADE_DURATION`, `XP_POPUP_PUNCH_SCALE` — accumulated counter that follows the player, fades after idle timeout                                                                      |
| Ability Defaults           | `ABILITY_DEFAULT_COOLDOWN`, `ABILITY_DEFAULT_DURATION`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Ship Visual Defaults       | `DEFAULT_VISUAL_WIDTH`, `DEFAULT_VISUAL_HEIGHT`, `DEFAULT_COLLISION_RADIUS`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Rarity / Upgrade Rolls     | `RARITY_ORDER`, `RARITY_DEFAULT_WEIGHTS`, luck model, tier multipliers                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Weapon Tier Upgrade System | `MAX_WEAPON_LEVEL`, `WEAPON_RARITY_FACTORS`, stat pick counts, stat weights                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Arena / Boundary           | `ARENA_RADIUS`, `RADIATION_BELT_WIDTH`, `RADIATION_DAMAGE_PER_SEC`, `RADIATION_PUSH_FORCE`, `PLAYER_SPAWN_MAX_RADIUS_COVERAGE`, `ENEMY_DESPAWN_BUFFER`, leash constants                                                                                                                                                          |
| Minimap / Fog of War       | `MINIMAP_SIZE`, `MINIMAP_WORLD_RADIUS_COVERAGE`, `FULLMAP_SIZE`, `FULLMAP_GRID_RING_INTERVAL_COVERAGE`, `FOG_GRID_SIZE`, `FOG_REVEAL_RADIUS`, `FOG_GLOW_INTENSITY`, `FOG_OPACITY`                                                                                                                                                |
| Space Stations             | `STATION_DENSITY`, `STATION_ZONE_RADIUS`, `STATION_CHARGE_TIME`, `STATION_DECAY_TIME`, `STATION_RARITY_WEIGHTS`, `STATION_BUFF_RANGES`, `STATION_BUFFABLE_STATS`, `STATION_COLLISION_RADIUS`, `STATION_MIN_SEPARATION`, `STATION_BUFF_OPTION_COUNT`, `STATION_FLAT_STATS`, `STATION_STAT_DISPLAY_NAMES`, `STATION_RARITY_COLORS` |
| Asteroids                  | `ASTEROID_DENSITY`, `ASTEROID_SIZE_MIN`, `ASTEROID_SIZE_MAX`, `ASTEROID_VERTEX_COUNT_MIN/MAX`, `ASTEROID_MIN_SEPARATION`, `ASTEROID_RADIUS_JITTER`                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Enemy Asteroid Interaction | `ENEMY_ASTEROID_SLOW_MULTIPLIER` — speed multiplier when enemy overlaps an asteroid                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Enemy Leash                | `ENEMY_LEASH_RADIUS`, `BOSS_LEASH_RADIUS` — max distance from player before teleport-respawn                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Power-Ups                  | `POWERUP_BASE_DROP_CHANCE`, `POWERUP_HEALTH_RESTORE_FRACTION`, `POWERUP_SPEED_BOOST_AMOUNT`, `POWERUP_SPEED_BOOST_DURATION`, `POWERUP_STOPWATCH_DURATION`, `POWERUP_SCATTER`, `POWERUP_COLLISION_RADIUS`, `POWERUP_VISUAL_SIZE`                                                                                                  |
| Gravity Well               | `GRAVITY_WELL_VACUUM_SPEED`, `GRAVITY_WELL_BEACON_DENSITY`, `GRAVITY_WELL_BEACON_ACTIVATION_RADIUS`, `GRAVITY_WELL_BEACON_MIN_SEPARATION`                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Space Nukes                | `NUKE_LAUNCH_ARC_MIN_DEG`, `NUKE_LAUNCH_ARC_MAX_DEG`, `NUKE_BASE_TARGETING_RADIUS`, `NUKE_MISSILE_SPEED_FACTOR`                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Beacon Visuals             | `BEACON_CIRCLE_RADIUS`, `BEACON_CIRCLE_COLOR`, `BEACON_CIRCLE_COLOR_DEPLETED`, `BEACON_TITLE_COLOR`, `BEACON_PROMPT_COLOR`                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
